rulings.Case Title: RUSS BUILDING VENTURE LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. HENNEFER FINLEY & WOOD, LLP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANTS HENNEFER FINLEY & WOOD, LLP AND JAMES HENNEFER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist regarding "inequitable result if the acts in question are treated as these of the corporation alone." See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Separate Statement and Defendant's Response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. The Court further notes that Defendant's moving papers contain no legal authority on the motion for summary adjudication (discussing applicable legal standards motion for summary judgment only, Points and Authorities 8:1-20) and providing no authority for the proposition that alter ego is an appropriate issue for summary adjudication under CCP 437c(f)(1). CCP 437c(f)(1) is not mentioned in the points and authorities. None of the cases cited in the "legal standard" section of the Points and Authorities involved a motion for summary adjudication. Moving party does not point to any of the cases listed in its Table of Authorities as a case involving a summary adjudication of alter ego claim. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ADAM NUNZIATO, AN INDIVIDUAL VS. ROBERT J. KORMAN, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE OF ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Joint Motion For Reconsideration Of Hon. Harold E. Kahns Order Denying Specially Appearing Defendants Joint Motion To Quash Service Of Request For Entry Of Default, Statement Of Damages And Proofs Of Service; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Affidavit Of Robert Korman In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2024 line 2. DEFENDANTS ROBERT J. KORMAN, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE OF AND NANCY E. RYTI, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE'S OF THE NOTICE OF AND JOINT MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF HON. HAROLD E. KAHN'S ORDER DENYING SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS' JOINT MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, STATEMENT OF DAMAGES AND PROOFS OF SERVICE is DENIED. rulings.Case Title: YEHONATAN EVEN ZOR ET AL VS. DRAGONFLY ASSETS C-52, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2024 line 3. DEFENDANT DRAGONFLY ASSETS C-52, LLC AND AMIT HELLER'S NOTICE OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is GRANTED. Defendant's objections to Hackett declaration are sustained. There is a binding arbitration clause in the parties' contract and Plaintiff failed to show any procedural or substantive unconscionability. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ROSEMARY RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2024 line 6. DEFENDANT ROSEMARY RODRIGUEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by the demurrer. No opposition filed.
